title: STAR - UMBC Forest Fire Detection Project
content:
Project: UMBC Forest Fire Detection Using Satellite Imagery

Situation:
- Environmental monitoring use case required identifying wildfire risk from remote sensing imagery.

Task:
- Build a computer vision pipeline using satellite-derived features for classification and detection.

Action:
- Developed CNN-based modeling workflow on Sentinel-2 imagery inputs.
- Incorporated remote sensing indices as part of feature or signal design strategy.
- Tuned model training and evaluation for balanced performance.
- Documented findings with an applied, domain-aware methodology.

Result:
- Source-reported strong classification performance in the project.
- Reinforced capability to combine ML architecture with domain-specific signal engineering.
